---
title: "Isabel Charlotte Elgie, later Elgee"
---

## Isabel Charlotte Elgie, later Elgee

**Dates:** (1875-?1939)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. [[person:478]W. F. Elgie], Vicar of Otterbourne, and goddaughter of CMY

### Biography

She married Harry Burton in 1906.  [marriage index;  notice about probate <i>The Times</i>, 16 October 1939]

### Letters

- Letter from [December? <i>c</i>.1880?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
